text:
There are up to 25 diagnosis codes (variables called DGNSCD1–DGNSCD25). 

ICD-10 codes were used starting October 2015.The diagnosis version code for these 25 diagnoses 
appears in variables DGNS_VRSN_CD_1–DGNS_VRSN_CD_25, which indicates whether this diagnosis 
code is ICD-9 or ICD-10. 

This field was new in 2011.
